scope.description: Fix ActionPanel UX issues found by CEO: duplicate cards, wrong timestamps, no detail/clickability, no useful info for decision-making. Also fix underlying data and watcher issues causing wrong stats.

dod.criterion: When directive is awaiting_completion, only ONE card appears (not both URGENT + NEEDS ATTENTION)

tasks.title: Fix 'just now' timestamp on directive cards

dod.criterion: Directive cards use startedAt instead of lastUpdated for time display
Time shows real elapsed duration (e.g. '2h ago') not always 'just now'

tasks.title: Make directive cards clickable with expandable detail view

dod.criterion: Directive cards show pointer cursor and expand/collapse on click
Collapsed state shows mini-stats: X/Y projects, X/Y tasks
Expanded state shows: pipeline progress, per-project breakdown with status icons, task totals, current state

tasks.title: Improve status chip labels for directive cards

dod.criterion: Awaiting completion card shows 'Awaiting Approval' chip instead of vague 'Complete'
Pipeline action cards retain 'Pipeline' chip

tasks.title: Auto-expand when only one directive card

dod.criterion: When there is only 1 directive card total, it renders expanded by default (no click needed)

tasks.title: Show weight as a visible chip on directive cards

dod.criterion: Weight (lightweight/medium/heavyweight/strategic) shown as a colored chip next to the kind chip, always visible in header

tasks.title: Fix pipeline-v2 directive data — task statuses and step format

dod.criterion: gate-script project: all 5 tasks marked done (work was done)
watcher-and-dashboard project: all tasks marked done (work was done)
pipeline-v2 directive.json: current_step uses named ID 'completion' not 'step-8'
pipeline-v2 directive.json: completion.status is 'active' not 'awaiting'

tasks.title: Fix watcher task count — match both 'completed' and 'done' statuses

dod.criterion: directive-watcher.ts counts tasks with status 'done' OR 'completed' as completed

tasks.title: Fix watcher step count — infer completed for steps before current_step

dod.criterion: Steps before current_step that have no explicit data are inferred as 'completed' not 'pending'

tasks.title: Urgent tier section is always open, not collapsible

dod.criterion: Urgent section has no collapse toggle — always shows its items

tasks.title: Add approve button on awaiting_completion directive cards

dod.criterion: Green 'Approve Completion' button visible on directive-completion cards
Button calls POST /api/actions/directive-complete with action: 'approve'
Button shows loading state while request is in flight
